claim_text: The empirical design centers on a post-2022 regime shift and post-2022 performance.
Nominal-rate beta is estimated before the post-2022 period over 1990-01 to 2021-12.
notes: Timing also cross-checked in outputs/data_integrity_report.md lines 63-67.

claim_text: Real-rate and BEI betas are estimated over 2003-01 to 2021-12.
notes: Timing also cross-checked in outputs/data_integrity_report.md lines 63-67.

claim_text: The preferred U.S. cross-section uses 176 signal observations.
notes: Same N appears in Columns A-F.

claim_text: In the preferred U.S. specification, real_beta coefficient is 0.2112 and t-statistic is 4.06.
With Cat.Economic fixed effects, real_beta t-statistic is 2.85.
With category-clustered standard errors, real_beta t-statistic is 3.37.
Nominal-rate beta baseline coefficient is -0.1607 and t-statistic is -4.62.
After market beta and pre-period volatility controls, nominal-rate beta coefficient is -0.0816 and t-statistic is -1.37.
International validation sample has 3,251 factor-country observations, 22 countries, 153 factors, and 7 themes.
notes: Coverage also reported in outputs/w2/w2_coverage_report.md lines 16-19.

claim_text: Category-level aggregation coefficient is 0.3509 and t-statistic is 2.01.
Signal bootstrap 95 percent interval is [0.1172, 0.3213].
Leave-one-category tests produce no sign flips.
Leave-one-month-out checks within 2022 keep the coefficient positive with minimum t-statistic 4.66.
The post-2022 monthly panel interaction coefficient is -0.5937 and t-statistic is -2.435.
notes: Same values cross-checked in outputs/cache_repro_check.md lines 67-68.

claim_text: W2-2 real_beta coefficient is 0.0624 and t-statistic is 7.72.
With theme fixed effects, W2 real_beta t-statistic is 6.14.
W2 country-clustered real_beta t-statistic is 3.63.
W2 factor-clustered real_beta t-statistic is 5.80.
W2 two-way country/factor clustered real_beta t-statistic is 3.35.
Pre-2022 and post-2022 phrasing in companion manuscript files follows the verified beta and post windows.
source_row_or_section: Pre window for real/BEI beta; Post window
notes: Real/BEI beta pre-window ends 2021-12; post window is 2022-01 onward.

claim_text: Under the same pre-break protocol, the 2022 real-rate coefficient is 0.1745 with a t-statistic of 2.99.
The 2022 pseudo-break coefficient is larger than all six 2014-2019 placebo coefficients, which range from -0.1488 to 0.0724.
notes: Actual row reports placebo_stronger_count=0 and placebo_n=6.

claim_text: The generated-regressor 95 percent interval is [0.0270, 0.2511] for six-month blocks.
The generated-regressor 95 percent interval is [0.0235, 0.2558] for twelve-month blocks.
The multiverse transparency table finds no unreported contradiction to the narrow regime-break claim.
notes: Nominal-rate fragility and negative panel evidence are explicitly classified as LIMITS.
